meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Escape Basic App Development
content.seo_description: Break past basic app limitations. A premium, advanced-level checklist to master Claude Code and Antigravity for high-impact AI engineering.
content.answer_block: To move beyond basic projects, integrate Claude Code into your terminal workflow. By combining its autonomous file-editing capabilities with Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding, you transform from a script-kiddie into an AI-driven systems engineer. This checklist provides the exact commands and prompts required to architect scalable, production-ready applications autonomously.
content.intro:
You’ve built the to-do list apps and the simple weather trackers. You know the syntax, but you feel the ceiling—your code is brittle, your architecture is non-existent, and you’re spending more time debugging boilerplate than actually building intelligence. The frustration of being 'stuck' at the entry-level is the hallmark of every engineer on the cusp of a breakthrough.

Today, we shatter that ceiling. By mastering the intersection of Claude Code’s autonomous CLI and Antigravity’s structural engine, you gain the leverage of a senior developer. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about commanding an AI agent to architect, debug, and deploy high-value software while you focus on the logic that matters.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using Antigravity to define project constraints and tech stack before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project directory structure for a production-grade SaaS application using Next.js 14 and TypeScript, emphasizing clean architecture patterns.

steps.title: Configure Autonomous Context Awareness
steps.description: Feed your project constraints into Claude Code to ensure the AI understands your architectural boundaries and coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claude_context file that defines our coding standards, naming conventions, and preferred library stack for this specific repository.

steps.title: Implement Domain-Driven Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on core business logic while ensuring it adheres to the modular structure defined in Step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current user authentication module to use a repository pattern, separating the business logic from the database implementation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Refactor auth/service.ts to implement repository pattern and inject database interface.'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Shift from manual testing to AI-driven verification, ensuring your code remains resilient as you scale features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive suite of unit and integration tests for the newly created domain services, covering edge cases in the payment gateway.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate vitest suite for auth/service.ts and run tests with coverage reporting.'

steps.title: Production-Ready Deployment Orchestration
steps.description: Bridge the gap between local development and production by automating your CI/CD pipeline configuration through Claude.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions workflow file that automates linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml with automated testing and deployment steps.'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file in the root; Claude Code treats this as the source of truth for your project's architectural decisions.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints'—tell the AI what libraries or patterns you strictly forbid to prevent bloat.
When stuck, use the 'claude --explain' command to force the AI to walk you through its logic before it writes a single file.
Treat your terminal like a REPL for your entire codebase; pipe Claude Code outputs directly into your local testing suite for instant validation.
Master the art of 'Context Injection' by periodically summarizing your current progress into a 'checkpoint.md' to reset Claude's focus.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully automated your first module, begin documenting your workflow in a public GitHub repo to showcase your ability to leverage AI as a force multiplier.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same tools as top-tier AI engineers. Don't let this knowledge sit in a tab. Push your code, break your limits, and document your journey. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
